description: The Mafia corsa refers to the mafia structures originating from Corsica, consisting of numerous small criminal groups. It has a tradition of banditry and crime similar to southern Italy, with strong ties to political and economic circles and widespread extortion. The organization was involved in the French Connection heroin trafficking to the United States in the 1970s. Corsica has the highest homicide rate per capita in Europe.

country_links.evidence_quote: Negli anni settanta i suoi clan costituivano la French Connection , massiccio traffico di eroina verso gli USA destinata perlopiù alla mafia statunitense .
country_links.context: The Mafia corsa trafficked heroin to the United States via the French Connection.
